payload.answer: I would not commit this as a durable resolved fact yet. It can be retained only as an ambiguous report unless Sam’s identity, Goldman’s identity, and the intended calendar dates are clarified.

entity_resolution.reason: “Sam” is not uniquely identifiable, “Goldman” may refer to an organization such as Goldman Sachs but was not explicitly specified, and the relative dates “last Friday” and “next month” depend on the intake/reference date.

memory_cards.statement: Sam said on “last Friday” that he is leaving Goldman “next month”; both relative time references are preserved as stated and not resolved to calendar dates.

details: Deferred durable memory commit because key entity and time references are ambiguous.
Preserved the original relative-time wording rather than resolving it.

repair_options: Clarify which Sam this refers to.
Clarify whether Goldman means Goldman Sachs or another entity.
Clarify the calendar date meant by “last Friday.”
Clarify the month meant by “next month.”
